purpose: Declares runtime-specific facts (skill discovery path, skill load model) for each AI-coding runtime the kit targets. Single authoritative source so prose across skills and adapters stops drifting from live docs.

runtimes.skill_load_model: Skill directories watched from session start; adding, editing, or removing a skill inside an already-watched directory takes effect within the current session without restart; creating a top-level skills directory that did not exist at session start requires restarting Claude Code so the new directory can be watched.
Rules files loaded at session start; edits require session restart.
